mechanic._payout_note: Asymmetric 'tease wild' 9-segment design. Outer ring carries 2 jesters (the wild teases on the first reel ~22% of the time); mid + inner carry 1 jester each (~11%). Suits stay 2/9 each on mid + inner; outer down-weights diamond from 2 to 1 to absorb the extra jester slot. Two-tier payout: triple (wild promotes pairs-with-jester into triples) wins, pair refunds the stake.
mechanic._presentation_note: Presentation comes from the casino manifest's mechanic_defaults (glass_covered). Override per child if a sub-game wants the open mechanical rotor instead.
mechanic._segment_distribution: Tease-wild — asymmetric reels. Outer (sum 9): J=2, S=2, H=2, C=2, D=1. Mid + Inner (each sum 9): J=1, S=2, H=2, C=2, D=2. The 2/9 jester slot on outer (vs 1/9 on mid+inner) makes the wild appear on the first reel twice as often, building anticipation before mid + inner spin. The all-three-jesters landing fires at 2/729 (≈0.27%) — doubled from the symmetric build's 1/729 because the extra outer jester slot bumps the joint probability.
mechanic._rtp_note: Calibrated ~95.7% RTP (house edge 4.3%). Win 17.7% (triples after wild promotion), push 59.3% (any pair, natural or jester-tie), forfeit 23.0% (3-distinct-non-jester only). Tease reels lift the triple rate from 14.4% (symmetric) to 17.7% while CUTTING the lose rate from 26.3% to 23.0%. Jackpot capped at 5x (return 6x) to keep the win sized for the mini-game's role as a wager-processor inside the chip economy — a single landing can't blow up the house pool. The doubled jackpot probability (2/729 vs 1/729 sym) compensates: jackpot fires twice as often.
mechanic._award_semantics: Positive = win (wager * (1 + award) returned). -1 = push (wager refunded, no winnings). 0 / missing = forfeit (wager kept by house).

payout_patterns._note: Triple — wild jester absorbs into the best non-wild suit. Uniform 1x suit triples (tease reels supply variety via reel feel; awards stay symmetric for simple rules). All-jester landing pays 5x (the headline jackpot, ~0.27%) — capped low to fit the chip economy where a single big win shouldn't drain the house pool.

Pair — every pair pushes (stake refunded). Catches both natural pairs (2 same + 1 different non-jester) and jester-pair tie-breaks (1 jester + 2 distinct non-jester, which the wild logic resolves to the higher-rank suit's pair). Net effect: any 2-of-a-kind landing on the rings refunds the wager.

mechanic._icon_passthrough_note: Slot icons ship with canonical colours baked in (red diamond/heart, brass spade/club/jester) via tools/generate_slot_icons.py.
